# meok-x402-wrap-mcp

> MEOK x402 Wrap MCP — 1-line USDC paywall for any FastMCP tool. Coinbase x402 + on-chain settlement on Base / Polygon / Solana / Lightning. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- wrap_tool
- decode_payment_header
- generate_402_challenge
- verify_settlement
- list_chains
- sign_receipt

## Install
```
pip install meok-x402-wrap-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-x402-wrap-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
